privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated tax data for a fictional long-haul truck driver named Marcus Thibodeau. The verifier logic enforces specific values: a T4 employment income of $68,200, Manitoba rent of $16,800, and child care expenses. Crucially, the TL2 meals deduction is strictly evaluated at $9,825.60, which corresponds to exactly 178 days at the CRA 2024 flat meal rate of $69/day ($23/meal x 3) multiplied by the 80% long-haul deduction rate ($12,282 * 80%). The expected output file is "marcus_thibodeau.24t".
